---
created: "2026-03-25T00:00:00Z"
updated: "2026-04-08T16:57:06-06:00"
id: task-sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full
key: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full
state: active
tags:
  - sv0
  - sv0-toolchain
  - roadmap
  - option-c
  - meta
title: "roadmap: full toolchain (option C ‚Äî design milestones 2‚Äì6 + cross-cutting)"
type: task
graph_entity_type: roadmap
---

# full toolchain roadmap (option C)

## purpose

this file is the **parent-repo index** for the complete implementation surface described in the [sv0 compiler vision and design](http://development.sasankvishnubhatla.net/tcowmbh/task/sv0-compiler-vision-and-design.html): from self-hosting preparation through LLVM, static verification, kernel support, macros, literate sources, rich `std`/`crypto`, and packaging.

use it to:

- see **which task file owns** each design milestone slice
- **order work** (dependencies and suggested sequencing)
- **refine acceptance criteria** as the design and implementation learn from each other

## configuration

/env: SV0TOOLCHAIN_ROOT=.
/env: SV0DOC_ROOT=sv0doc
/env: SV0C_ROOT=sv0c
/env: SV0VM_ROOT=sv0vm
/env: SV0_MCP_ROOT=sv0-mcp
/env: DESIGN_DOC_URL=http://development.sasankvishnubhatla.net/tcowmbh/task/sv0-compiler-vision-and-design.html

## verify roadmap artifacts

/run: 01-verify-roadmap-artifacts.sh

## design milestone ‚Üí repo task files

| design milestone (vision doc) | primary repo task(s) | notes |
|--------------------------------|------------------------|--------|
| 0 ‚Äî language specification (prose + agreed roadmap) | design HTML; `task/sv0doc-milestone-0.Rmd` (extracted formal spec) | normative extracted spec lives in **sv0doc/** |
| 1 ‚Äî bootstrap compiler (SML) | `task/sv0c-milestone-1.Rmd` | C backend; state tracked in that file |
| 2 ‚Äî self-hosting **preparation** | `task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd` (VM slice) + `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd` (fmt, doc, test harness, `lib/` bootstrap seeds) | two files on purpose: VM is deep; prep is cross-cutting |
| 3 ‚Äî self-hosting compiler | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd` | compiler in sv0; bootstrap SML archived |
| 4 ‚Äî advanced verification | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-4-verification.Rmd` | SMT, refinement types, `sv0 verify` |
| 5 ‚Äî LLVM + production crypto | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-5-llvm-crypto.Rmd` | LLVM IR backend + crypto library hardening |
| 6 ‚Äî kernel development | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-6-kernel.Rmd` | `asm!`, boot/link, HAL, minimal kernel |
| (cross-cutting, multi-milestone) | `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-cross-cutting.Rmd` | macros, `.sv0.md` literate, `std`/concurrency, packaging |
| developer graph + MCP | `task/sv0-mcp-milestone-0.Rmd` | supports all phases; **task milestone 0 complete** (server, tests, docs, sync discipline); not a language design milestone |

## dependency graph (high level)

```
sv0doc (spec) ‚îÄ‚îÄ> sv0c (SML) ‚îÄ‚îÄ> sv0vm (bytecode)
                    ‚îÇ
                    ‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ milestone-2-prep (tooling + lib/ bootstrap seeds)
                    ‚îÇ
                    v
            self-host (milestone 3)
                    ‚îÇ
        ‚îå‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îº‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îê
        v           v           v
 verification   llvm/crypto   kernel
    (4)            (5)          (6)
        ‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚î¥‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îÄ‚îò
              cross-cutting (macros, literate, std, packages)
```

## refinement protocol (living plan)

**sources of truth**

1. **Language vision and examples** ‚Äî design HTML (and any successor doc). Major semantic or syntax shifts start here.
2. **Implementable specification** ‚Äî **sv0doc/** (grammar, types, contracts, memory model, bytecode when specified there). Compiler and VM must align with this when building production behavior.
3. **Milestone acceptance criteria** ‚Äî each `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-*.Rmd` and submodule milestone. Update these when scope or order changes.

**how to refine during implementation**

- When you change the **design**, note the implication in the relevant milestone file (deliverables, `/ai:` prompts, or a short ‚Äúdecision log‚Äù subsection in markdown).
- When you discover **spec gaps**, prefer a **sv0doc** change plus a one-line pointer from the milestone that depended on the gap.
- When a milestone grows too large, **split** it: add `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-N-<topic>.Rmd` and `/include:` it from the parent milestone (same pattern as `sv0c-milestone-1.Rmd`).

**recent roadmap notes**

- 2026-04-07: **`task/sv0-mcp-milestone-0.Rmd`** ‚Üí **`state: complete`** + **`roadmap_parent: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full`**; **`sv0c/examples/learn/`** adds **`18`**/**`19`**. **Design milestone 3** (self-hosting) is still **not met** ‚Äî see **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd`**.
- 2026-04-07: **sv0c** ‚Äî mut struct field **`=`** / **`+=`** and **`ExprAssignOp`** in checker + lowering; vm-parity **101**; learn **`20_struct_mut_field_assign.sv0`**. **M3** bar unchanged (full transliteration + native self-host + SML retirement).
- 2026-04-08: Learn **`21_mut_i32_compound.sv0`**; **M3** self-host doc **done-ish** vm-parity count fixed to **101**; **sv0-mcp** README sync guidance for **`examples/learn/`**.
- 2026-04-08: **sv0c** ‚Äî **`lib/lower_assign_lhs_core.sv0`** (**`classifyAssignLhs`** slice) + stage0 golden; self-host pilot list **23** entries. **M3** still **not** met.
- 2026-04-08: **sv0c** ‚Äî **`lib/lower_ast_ty_cstring_core.sv0`** (**`astTyToCString`** class slice) + golden; self-host pilots **24**. **M3** still **not** met.
- 2026-04-08: **sv0c** ‚Äî **`lib/lower_value_to_expr_core.sv0`** (**`valueToExpr`**) + golden; self-host pilots **25**. **M3** still **not** met.
- 2026-04-08 (**America/Denver ‚àí06:00**): **sv0c** ‚Äî **`lib/lower_ast_binop_to_c_core.sv0`** (**`astBinopToC`** ‚Üí single- vs two-character C operator width classes) + stage0 golden; self-host pilots **26**. **M3** still **not** met.
- 2026-04-08 (**America/Denver ‚àí06:00**): **sv0c** ‚Äî **`lib/lower_expr_init_cty_core.sv0`** (**`exprInitCty`** expr-shape ‚Üí C initializer type decision classes) + stage0 golden; self-host pilots **27**. Tags **`self-host-sv0-loop-v7`** / **`toolchain-self-host-sv0-loop-v7`**. **M3** still **not** met.
- 2026-04-08 (**America/Denver ‚àí06:00**): **sv0c** ‚Äî **`lib/lower_match_scrut_cty_core.sv0`** (**`matchScrutCty`**: scrut locals, param **`astTyToCString`** subset, callee, tuple peel, lits) + stage0 golden; self-host pilots **28**. Tags **`self-host-sv0-loop-v8`** / **`toolchain-self-host-sv0-loop-v8`**. **M3** still **not** met.

**YAML `state` convention** (optional but recommended)

- `draft` ‚Äî scope or criteria not frozen
- `active` ‚Äî in progress
- `complete` ‚Äî criteria met; keep file for history
- `superseded` ‚Äî replaced by another task id; link to successor in the body

**graph sync (sv0-mcp)**

- `graph_entity_type: roadmap` on this file ‚Äî Neo4j node label `Roadmap` (not inferred from the key).
- `roadmap_parent: sv0-toolchain-roadmap-full` on child milestone tasks ‚Äî creates `PART_OF` edges into this roadmap for `sv0://roadmaps` and `get_roadmap_children`.
- After you change **task/** milestones, **sv0doc** normative files, or major **sv0c** / **sv0vm** layout, refresh the graph: from **sv0-mcp**, `./scripts/sync-graph.sh all` (or `uv run sv0-mcp sync --scope all`). Cursor agents can also call the **sv0-graph** MCP tool **`sync_graph`** with scope **`all`**. **`./scripts/sv0 test`** runs **`verify_task_rmd_frontmatter.py`** so common YAML typos in **`task/*.Rmd`** (missing space after **`:`**) fail before a bad sync, **`verify_readme_sv0c_gitlink.py`** so the **README** pinned **sv0c** SHA matches **`git ls-tree HEAD sv0c`**, and **`verify_vm_parity_manifest_bootstrap.py`** so **`sv0c/test/vm-parity/manifest.txt`** ‚äÜ **`sv0c/lib/bootstrap-sources.list`**. For a **fast Python-only** pass (block comments, **sv0doc** baseline, task YAML, README gitlink, manifest/bootstrap invariant) without **SML**, use **`./scripts/sv0 test-guards`** or **`make test-guards`**.

## milestones 0‚Äì3 ‚Äî progress snapshot

This is a human-readable summary; detailed criteria stay in each **`task/sv0-*-milestone-*.Rmd`**.

| Design milestone | Status (high level) | What ‚Äúdone‚Äù means today |
|------------------|---------------------|-------------------------|
| **0** ‚Äî language spec | **Baseline met** | **sv0doc** holds grammar, types, contracts, memory model, keywords, and **bytecode anchor** docs under **`bytecode/`**. Parent **`./scripts/sv0 test`** runs **`verify_sv0doc_baseline.py`** so required paths cannot disappear silently. Normative prose can still evolve. |
| **1** ‚Äî SML bootstrap compiler | **Met** | **sv0c** lexer through C backend; unit + integration tests green under **`./scripts/sv0 test`**. |
| **2** ‚Äî self-host prep | **Met** (split: VM vs prep) | **sv0vm** runs bytecode; **sv0c** emits **`.sv0b`**. Prep slice: **`sv0 test`** (includes **sv0doc** baseline, block-comment guard, **`task/*.Rmd`** YAML lint, **README** **sv0c** gitlink check, **vm-parity manifest ‚äÜ bootstrap-sources** guard, **stage0** golden C for listed seeds, doctests), **`sv0 test-guards`** / **`make test-guards`** for the same Python checks without **SML**, **fmt**, **doc**, **bootstrap-in-sv0** programs. |
| **3** ‚Äî self-hosting compiler | **Not met** | **Bar (see `task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd`):** **sv0** at **feature parity** with SML; **VM** fully functional; **strict** bytecode vs SML on a **curated ~50‚Äì100** program suite (allowlist only); diagnostics **behavioral** first, **tighten to strict**. **Retirement:** tag **`bootstrap-sml-final`** (**sv0c** repo only), **`sv0c/sml/`** ‚Üí **`sml-legacy/`**, default build **sv0-only**. **Progress:** VM **`break`/`continue`** including **`for`**+**`break`**; **`no_alias`/`VAddrOf`** on VM (**slot tokens** + builtin **`1`**); **vm-parity** **101** SML bytecode goldens (**`vm-parity-v2.1`**); **`sv0c/examples/learn/`** through **`21_mut_i32_compound`**; **`sv0c/doc/transliteration-plan.md`**; **self-host loop interface** in CI (**twenty-eight** pilot seeds **`cc`**+run; **`sv0-self-host-emit-c.sh`** vs SML **`diff`** by default; swap for native sv0 compiler when ready); transliteration **checklist** in **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-checklist.Rmd`**; mut **field** assign + **compound** assign in **SML** pipeline; **semantic** self-host, **`forall`/`exists`** VM gaps, and SML retirement **not** done. |

**Finishing milestone 3** requires **compiler transliteration and a bootstrap recipe**, not only docs or tests. Use **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd`** (‚Äúremaining work vs definition of done‚Äù) for the live checklist; **`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd`** (‚Äúquick start‚Äù) for the unified test entry.

## suggested implementation order

1. close **VM + integration parity** (`task/sv0vm-milestone-2.Rmd`) ‚Äî **complete**
2. advance **prep** tooling and **`lib/`** bootstrap seeds (`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-2-prep.Rmd`) ‚Äî **complete**
3. **self-hosting** (`task/sv0-toolchain-milestone-3-self-host.Rmd`)
4. parallel tracks as staffing allows: **verification** (4), **cross-cutting** items that unblock macros/tests, **MCP** polish
5. **LLVM + crypto** (5), then **kernel** (6)

/ai: when the design doc gains a new numbered milestone or renames scope, update this file‚Äôs mapping table and the affected child milestone Rmd files in the same change set.
